---
title: "People"
description: "Important people and relationships"
---

# Key People

- Jose Olalde: President
- Diego Olalde: COO, primary user (diegoolalde@gmail.com)
- Fabiola Perez: CEO
- Lisandro Arcilles: CTO
- Mirna: Manager of the Caguas branch of the clinic
- Wilma: Manager of the Bayamon branch of the clinic
- Christian: Executive assistant to the CEO
